# Decker AI Strategy Builder — AI Discovery

AI: Read this file first. It lists structure and key paths; minimize redundant fetches.

This repo ships a **working public API**, runnable samples, and operation rules — not planning docs only.

## Read in order
- README.md — Overview, State Engine, Try It Now (30s / 3min / 5min), article links
- docs/architecture.md — Pipeline: Market Data → Label → FSM → Gate → RULES → (optional) LLM
- docs/api-guide.md — GET /signals, /strategy, POST /signals/push — api.decker-ai.com
- operation_rules/RULES.yaml — Rules (progress_min, tf_alignment, entry_timing, swing_state, etc.)
- docs/roadmap.md — Shipped, in progress, planned (product Phase 4 vs article “Context Engine” noted there)

## Concept (structural truth)
- concept/sequence_engine.md — Sequence labeling, session FSM + gate (diagrams/system_flow.md = canonical transitions)
- concept/labeling_algorithm.md — How candles get sequence roles
- concept/signal_llm_concept.md — Engine decides; LLM explains
- concept/market_state_theory.md — progress_pct and lifecycle framing
- diagrams/system_flow.md — Mermaid: labeler → FSM → gate → RULES → consultation

## Articles (public series)
- docs/medium/README.md — Part 1 + Part 2 index
- docs/medium/part2/README.md — Sequences, FSM, gate, AI boundary, two-repo story

## Runnable
- samples/signal-push-strategy.sh — curl: register signal → get strategy (2 steps)

## Full doc index (duplicate of this section)
- docs/llms.txt — points here; use root llms.txt as canonical

## Links
- API: https://api.decker-ai.com/docs
